cells.rationale: Contract-shaped design across four confined agents introducing a new template pattern with a subtle security/confinement invariant (data-delimited incident input, receipts never lifting grants, per-role denylists) whose wrong abstraction propagates to every consumer.

Judgment-heavy, under-specified prose rewrite of three skills into thin wrappers that mirror the existing work-skill Task-spawn idiom and preserve delicate dual-use close-out behavior, needing taste and idiom-matching but not opus-level novel reasoning.
